title: Supporting information
description: Information to help you complete your paper tax return or tax return supplement.
keywords: TaxPack, tax return, 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on 2024
child_links.description: Information about those amounts that you do not pay tax on.

child_links.title: Adjusted taxable income for you and your dependants 2024
child_links.description: Work out your adjusted taxable income (ATI) and if you're eligible for certain tax offsets.

child_links.title: Special circumstances 2024
child_links.description: Find out more about completing certain questions in your tax return where special circumstances apply.

child_links.title: Car and travel expenses 2024
child_links.description: You may be able to claim deductions for work-related car expenses and work-related travel expenses.

child_links.title: Rebate income 2024
child_links.description: Work out your rebate income and if you're eligible for the seniors and pensioners tax offset at question T1.

child_links.title: Claiming deductions 2024
child_links.description: You may be able to claim deductions for work-related expenses you incurred while performing your job as an employee.

child_links.title: Referred publications 2024
child_links.description: Use these referred publications to help you understand your tax obligations and prepare your Individual tax return 2024.

child_links.title: Checklist - tax return 2024
child_links.description: Complete the tax return checklist to avoid any delays when you lodge your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - supplement 2024
child_links.description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.
